configs.name: sx
configs.description: Start a fake chademo charging, then wait for ccs to join. Should work better with Xpeng and Lexus.

configs.name: v2x
configs.description: v2x mode permanently enabled. Should work equally well for charging, but some cars may not like it (speculation).

configs.name: v2x-ao
configs.description: v2x mode permanently enabled. Should work equally well for charging, but some cars may not like it (speculation). Always on. After inactivity or charging ended, do a soft restart instead of shutting down. When battery drops below 3.3V, it will power off instead. Errors and stop buttons will power off, as usual.

configs.name: av1
configs.description: For target voltage 410v, use nominal voltage 380v instead of 355v. av1 should be a better match for Leaf/e-NV200 with 20-30kwh battery.

configs.name: jdemo125A
configs.description: Jdemo quirks: prevent dynamic control and limit to 125A.
